heading: Omitted
label: 541 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which assigned individual monetary credits from the judgment fund to members of the Klamath Tribes to be used for certain purposes, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Aug. 7, 1939, ch. 552, § 153 Stat. 1252
